"CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-277", "name": "Insecure Inherited Permissions"}], "description": "## Summary
ACP child sessions inherit subagent security envelope constraints.

## Affected Packages / Versions
- Package: openclaw (npm)
- Affected versions: <= 2026.4.21
- Fixed version: 2026.4.22

## Impact
A restricted subagent spawning an ACP child session could fail to carry forward subagent-only constraints such as depth, child-count limits, control scope, or target-agent restrictions.

## Fix
ACP spawn now resolves and persists child subagent envelope fields, enforces maximum depth and active-child caps, and applies the inherited control scope to child ACP sessions.

## Fix Commit(s)
- 31160dc069b7cc5d833b39c53736a41ad3befda2

## Verification
- The fix commit is contained in the public v2026.4.22 tag.
- openclaw@2026.4.22 is published on npm and the compiled package contains the fix.
- Focused regression coverage for this path passed before publication.

OpenClaw thanks @zsxsoft, @qclawer, and @KeenSecurityLab for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00221, "percentile": 0.12573}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-q3jj-46pq-826r", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-04T20:21:49Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q3jj-46pq-826r", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-q3jj-46pq-826r"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44997"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-04T20:21:49Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-q3jj-46pq-826r", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/31160dc069b7cc5d833b39c53736a41ad3befda2", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44997", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-security-envelope-constraint-bypass-in-acp-child-sessions", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q3jj-46pq-826r"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-q3jj-46pq-826r", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw's ACP child sessions inherit subagent security envelope constraints", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-29T03:48:04Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-q3jj-46pq-826r", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.22", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.4.21"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
